# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { EdgeConfig } from '@vercel/edge-config';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler() {
  const edgeConfig = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG as string;
  
  const defaultConfig = {
    API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
    DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
    FEATURE_FLAG_EXPERIMENTAL: false,
  };

  let configData = defaultConfig;

  if (edgeConfig) {
    try {
      const edgeConfigClient = new EdgeConfig(edgeConfig);
      const edgeConfigValues = await edgeConfigClient.getAll();
      
      configData = {
        API_KEY: edgeConfigValues.API_KEY || defaultConfig.API_KEY,
        DB_URL: edgeConfigValues.DB_URL || defaultConfig.DB_URL,
        FEATURE_FLAG_EXPERIMENTAL: edgeConfigValues.FEATURE_FLAG_EXPERIMENTAL || defaultConfig.FEATURE_FLAG_EXPERIMENTAL,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch Edge Config:', error);
    }
  }

  return new Response(JSON.stringify(configData), {
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  });
}
